title: ViTreous Explanation Pack Manifest
description: Single source of truth for the Explanation Pack manifest.json (§5 of ARCHITECTURE.md). Every binary asset in a pack is described by the asset index; the manifest loads first and binaries stream on demand. PACK FORMAT v1, FROZEN AT M2 — any change here must be mirrored in packages/core/.../packs/manifest.py and packages/schema/src/pack.ts and bump pack_version.

pack_version.description: Semantic version of the pack format. Frozen at milestone M2.

assets.description: Asset index: filename -> descriptor for every binary/JSON asset in the pack directory (§5).

hf_repo.description: Hugging Face Hub repo id hosting the fine-tuned weights.

num_layers.description: Transformer block count L (timeline length is L+1).

num_tokens.description: Sequence length incl. CLS token, e.g. 197 for ViT-S/16 @ 224.

patch_size.description: ViT patch side length in pixels, e.g. 16 (grid = image_size / patch_size).

name.description: Registry key of the dataset, e.g. 'eurosat'.

class_names.description: Ordered class labels; index i is class index i.

id.description: Stable image identifier; pack prefix in storage.

confidence.description: Softmax probability of the predicted class.

probabilities.description: Full softmax distribution over all classes; length == dataset.num_classes.

AssetEntry.description: Descriptor for one binary/JSON asset referenced by the manifest asset index.

dtype.description: Element dtype of the decoded array, or a container type for JSON/image assets.

shape.description: Logical shape of the decoded array; empty for scalar or non-array (json/image) assets.

encoding.description: On-disk encoding of the asset bytes.

bytes.description: On-disk size of the asset in bytes.

checksum.description: Optional content hash (e.g. 'sha256:...') for integrity checks.

quant.description: Present only for encoding 'per_row_uint8': the parameters needed to dequantize the asset back to floats.

QuantInfo.description: Per-row max-quantization parameters (§5 attention.bin). On-disk layout is the uint8 data block (C-order, `row_axis` = last axis) immediately followed by the per-row scales block. Dequantize row r as: data[r]/255 * scale[r]. Scale[r] is the max of the original row, so error <= 0.5/255 per element.

row_axis.description: Axis quantized per-row (a scale per index along all other axes). -1 = last axis.

scale_dtype.description: Element dtype of the scales block.

data_offset.description: Byte offset of the uint8 data block within the file.

data_bytes.description: Length of the uint8 data block in bytes.

scale_offset.description: Byte offset of the scales block within the file.

scale_count.description: Number of per-row scales (product of all axes except row_axis).

Timings.description: Wall-clock timings (milliseconds) for pipeline stages that produced the pack.
